highlights: Fixed master window ballooning to 100% on every notification (#271) — 75ms debounce coalesces spurious KWin minimize/unminimize cycles triggered by plasmashell popups
Filtered Plasma shell surfaces (notification popups, emoji picker, krunner) out of autotile tracking entirely
Settings toggle now recovers the systemd unit from failed state, so users can re-enable PlasmaZones after killing a terminal-run daemon without logging out
Fixed startup race where ephemeral windows (Steam splash, Electron notifications) bypassed the autotile size filter
New --log-file flag for easy file-based log capture
Autotile eligibility diagnostics show window properties at debug level
New --debug flag for easy diagnostic log capture (plasmazonesd --debug)
Deeper autotile debug logging for diagnosing the intermittent ratio bug (#271)
Fixed autotile windows being pushed off-screen when their minimum size exceeds the assigned zone
Reverted min-size clearing regression from 2.8.1 that triggered the off-screen centering
Added diagnostic logging for autotile retiles, min-sizes, zone geometries, and window eligibility
Fixed autotile ratio getting stuck after notification auto-dismiss (e.g., media player notifications)
Stale window min-sizes are now cleared on screen geometry changes to prevent split ratio override
Support report generator for quick bug report archives
Autotiled windows now survive layout switches, mode toggles, and daemon restarts
Visual OSD feedback when toggling on a disabled desktop or screen
Config migrated to v2 nested schema with automatic migration from v1
Assignments and session state split to dedicated files for cleaner configs
Daemon toggle now enables systemd service for autostart on login
Fixed assignment persistence and tiling order across daemon restarts
Fixed window restore after config v2 migration
Scripted algorithms with @param metadata now get auto-generated UI controls (sliders, switches, combo boxes)
Configurable ratio step size for master ratio keyboard adjustments
Per-screen master ratio and count overrides now persist correctly
Fixed shader dark band at adjacent zone edges in Aretha Shell
Reset to defaults now clears per-algorithm autotile settings
Editor shader error box restored, shader category duplication fixed
Config migrated from INI to JSON format with automatic migration on first launch
Dragging a window off autotile now keeps it where you dropped it
Master ratio and count shortcuts show actual values in the OSD
Shortcut-adjusted ratio and count now persist across reboots
Small utility windows like the emoji picker no longer enter the autotile tree
Focus-follows-mouse no longer steals focus through under-size windows
Tumbleweed Drift shader gains sand streams, stronger audio reactivity, and faster animation
Snap assist, overlay, and shortcut stability improvements
Tumbleweed Drift shader with openSUSE desert landscape and audio-reactive dust effects
Neon Venom and Chrome Protocol shaders
Voxel terrain now uses depth buffer and multipass rendering
Shader engine gains depth buffer support, per-channel filter/wrapping, and presets
Autotile JS API adds per-window context, custom parameters, and lifecycle hooks
Layout ordering settings for snapping and tiling cycle
Focus-follows-mouse no longer steals focus through excluded or overlay windows
